full_text:
Xiahou Hui (Zhiquan) 夏侯惠 (稚權)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Xiahou Hui (夏侯惠), styledZhiquan (稚權). Third son of Xiahou Yuan. Fought alongside his brother He on the front lines. Xiahou Hui was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
